raw_text:
48. Tooling Process Engineer

Job Summary  
Focuses on optimizing manufacturing processes related to tooling for improved productivity, 
quality, and cost efficien cy. 
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop and optimize tooling processes  
• Analyze production data and improve efficiency  
• Implement process improvements and cost reduction initiatives  
• Standardize machining and assembly processes  
• Support new product/tool introduct ion  
• Ensure compliance with quality standards  
Required Skills  
• Process engineering and optimization  
• Data analysis and problem -solving  
• Knowledge of machining and tooling processes  
• Lean manufacturing concepts  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Pr oduction  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹70,000 per month
